props.name: text
props.description: Text content that will be displayed and animated.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: Name of the variable font family.

props.name: fontUrl
props.description: URL for the variable font file (needed)

props.name: flex
props.description: Whether the characters are spaced using flex layout.

props.name: scale
props.description: If true, vertically scales the text to fill its container height.

props.name: alpha
props.description: If true, applies an opacity effect based on cursor distance.

props.name: stroke
props.description: If true, adds a stroke effect around characters.

props.name: width
props.description: If true, varies the variable-font "width" axis.

props.name: weight
props.description: If true, varies the variable-font "weight" axis.

props.name: italic
props.description: If true, varies the variable-font "italics" axis.

props.name: textColor
props.description: The fill color of the text

props.name: strokeColor
props.description: The stroke color that will be applied to the text when "stroke" is set to true

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class for styling the <h1> wrapper.

props.name: minFontSize
props.description: Sets a minimum font-size to avoid overly tiny text on smaller screens.
